basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Metro Rail Non Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 383 Sataion Controller, JE, Maintainer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Station Controller/Train Operator, Junior Engineer, Maintainer
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRCL) has officially announced the Recruitment of O&M Personnel (Non-Executives) 2026 with 383 openings. The detailed notification was published on 29th April 2026 at gujaratmetrorail.com. Candidates who meet the age criteria and hold qualifications such as Diploma in Engineering, ITI, or SSLC with ITI can now submit their online applications from 29 April 2026 to 28 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.age_limit: 18 to 28 Years (SC/TO & JE) / 18 to 25 Years (Maintainer) as on date of advertisement
age_limit.details: Age Limit (as on date of advertisement): | Station Controller/Train Operator & Junior Engineer: 18 to 28 Years Maintainer: 18 to 25 Years | Age Relaxation: | SEBC, EWS, SC & ST Male (Gujarat origin): 5 years SEBC, EWS, SC & ST Women (Gujarat origin): 10 years Women (Unreserved): 5 years Ex-Servicemen: Length of service + 3 years (max up to 45 years)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification. The post-wise minimum educational qualification requirements are as follows: | Station Controller/Train Operator (SC/TO), Jr. Engineer: Diploma in relevant Engineering discipline. Candidates with Degree in the same discipline are also eligible. Maintainer Posts: SSLC pass with Two Years ITI in relevant trade (Fitter / Electrician / Electronics). | Medical Standards: Candidates must meet the prescribed medical standards (A-1 / A-3 / B-1 category) as per Indian Railway Medical Manual.

salary_details.details: After successful completion of training & probation, candidates will be placed in IDA Pay Scales (₹33,000-1,00,000 for SC/TO & JE and ₹20,000-60,000 for Maintainers).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official GMRCL website. No hard copy or offline applications will be accepted. Candidates are advised to complete the application process well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.
Visit the official GMRCL website: https://www.gujaratmetrorail.com
Click on the “Careers” section or directly go to the recruitment link.
Select the GMRCL O&M Non-Executives Recruitment 2026 advertisement from the drop-down menu.
Click on “Apply” or “Apply Now” against the advertisement.

If you already have a One Time Registration (OTR) number, enter your OTR Number and Date of Birth to auto-fill your details. If you do not have an OTR number, click on “SKIP” or register fresh by filling in your personal details (Name, Father’s/Husband’s Name, Mother’s Name, Gender, Date of Birth, Category, Address, Mobile Number, Email ID, Aadhaar Number, Educational Qualification, etc.). An OTR number will be generated and sent to your registered mobile and email.
Fill up all the required details carefully in the online application form.
Upload your recent passport size colour photograph and signature as per the prescribed specifications (Photograph: max 15 KB, Signature: max 15 KB).
Carefully preview all the details filled in the application form. Make corrections if needed before final submission. No changes will be allowed after submission.
Proceed to the Payment section and pay the applicable application fee online using Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet.
After successful payment, an e-Receipt will be generated. Download and take a printout of the e-Receipt and the filled-in online application form for future reference
important_instructions: Candidates can apply from 29 April 2026 to 28 May 2026. Payment of fee can be done till 31 May 2026. Candidates should have a valid email ID and mobile number. Scan and upload recent passport size photograph and signature as per specifications. Government employees must submit NOC at the time of document verification. Candidates can apply for only one post. The name filled in the application must exactly match the name in your educational certificates and photo identity proof. Photograph and signature must be clear. Blurry images may lead to rejection. Application fee once paid is non-refundable. Government employees must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of document verification. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid heavy server traffic. Keep your registered email ID and mobile number active throughout the recruitment process. Take a printout of the final submitted application form and keep it safely along with the registration number and password.
Online Link: Click here to Apply Online
Important Note: Candidates are advised to visit the official website regularly for updates regarding the written test date, admit card, and other recruitment-related information.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GMRCL Non-Executives Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation Limited Non-Executives Recruitment 2026 is 28 May 2026. Candidates must complete the registration process before this deadline to avoid rejection. Additionally, the last date for payment of the application fee is 31 May 2026, so applicants should plan accordingly.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in GMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 383 vacancies have been released under the GMRCL Non-Executives Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are distributed among posts like Station Controller/Train Operator, Junior Engineer, and Maintainer. The recruitment aims to strengthen the Operations & Maintenance team of Ahmedabad and Surat Metro Rail projects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for GMRCL Non-Executive posts 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for GMRCL Non-Executive posts must have either a Diploma in Engineering for technical roles or SSLC with ITI certification for Maintainer posts. The qualifications should be from recognized institutions. Applicants must also meet the prescribed medical standards as per railway guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for Station Controller/Train Operator and Junior Engineer posts is 18 to 28 years, while for Maintainer posts it is 18 to 25 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories such as SC, ST, SEBC, EWS, women, and ex-servicemen as per Gujarat government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for GMRCL Non-Executives Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test, followed by a psycho aptitude test (for SC/TO posts), document verification, and medical examination. Candidates must qualify in each stage to move forward. Final selection will be based on merit and fulfillment of all eligibility conditions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for GMRCL Non-Executive posts?
faq.answer: During the training period, candidates will receive a stipend ranging from ₹14,000 to ₹18,000 per month depending on the post. After successful training, salaries increase to ₹16,000 to ₹20,000 per month. Later, employees are placed in IDA pay scales with higher salary benefits and allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply online for GMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website of Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation Limited at gujaratmetrorail.com. Applicants need to register, fill out the form, upload documents, and pay the fee online. It is important to verify all details before final submission to avoid errors.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for GMRCL Non-Executives 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for unreserved male candidates is ₹600, while candidates from SC, ST, SEBC, EWS categories, women, and ex-servicemen need to pay ₹300. The fee must be paid online through available digital payment methods. Note that the application fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply for multiple posts in GMRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, candidates are allowed to apply for only one post in the GMRCL Non-Executives Recruitment 2026. Submitting multiple applications may lead to disqualification. Applicants should carefully choose the post that matches their qualification and eligibility before applying.

faq.question: Q10. When will the GMRCL Non-Executives 2026 exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The written examination for GMRCL Non-Executives Recruitment 2026 is expected to be held in June or July 2026. The exact exam date will be announced on the official website. Candidates are advised to regularly check updates to stay informed about admit cards and exam schedules.
